Container.Name: nodi
Container.Overview: A self-hosted, multi-platform note-taking app. Create text and checklist notes, organise with tags, pin and archive, choose from 12 colour themes per note, and manage user accounts via an admin panel. Both the API and web app run inside a single container.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port the web app is served on.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Directory where the SQLite database and other persistent files are stored.

Config.Name: JWT Key
Config.Description: Secret key used to sign JWT tokens. Must be at least 32 characters.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Password for the admin account created on first run. Changing this later has no effect once the database is seeded.

Config.Name: Admin Username
Config.Description: Username for the admin account created on first run.

Config.Name: Admin Email
Config.Description: Email for the admin account created on first run.

Config.Name: JWT Expiry (hours)
Config.Description: How long issued JWT tokens remain valid, in hours.

Config.Name: Database Provider
Config.Description: Database backend. Use 'sqlite' for local storage or 'postgresql' for an external PostgreSQL database.

Config.Name: PostgreSQL Connection String
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string. Required only when Database Provider is set to 'postgresql'. Example: Host=db;Database=nodi;Username=nodi;Password=secret

Config.Name: Internal API Port
Config.Description: Internal API port inside the container. Usually does not need to be changed.

Config.Name: Internal Web Port
Config.Description: Internal web port inside the container. Must match the mapped container port.
